era: Indie / Emo. E=4 -- quiet, confessional, narrative. David Bazan. Faith and doubt. Greenwood enters. v1.49.339.

location.formative: North Seattle. Residential, understated. Not the scene -- the place where the artist lives.
location.career: Pedro the Lion. 1995-2006, 2017-present. Jade Tree Records. David Bazan solo overlap.

members.name: David Bazan
members.note: Sole constant. Warm, conversational voice. Narrative storytelling. Faith and doubt. Also solo career.

former_members.name: Various
former_members.note: Multiple members across eras. Bazan is the constant.

associated_musicians.name: Sunny Day Real Estate
associated_musicians.note: Emo parallel. Enigk faith/Bazan doubt. E=5 (SDRE) to E=4 (Pedro the Lion).

associated_musicians.name: Death Cab for Cutie
associated_musicians.note: Same indie scene. Ben Gibbard as parallel storyteller.

theory_nodes.concept: Greenwood enters -- first north Seattle neighborhood in the engine. Residential, understated, far from the scene. E=4 matches its character.
examples: First north Seattle neighborhood in the engine.
Contrasts with Capitol Hill (scene) and Ballard (waterfront).
E=4 neighborhood energy: present but not loud.
theory_nodes.description: Greenwood enters. New neighborhood. North Seattle.

genealogy.relationship: Pedro the Lion at 198. Greenwood opens a new quadrant.

theory_nodes.concept: Faith-doubt thread in emo -- Enigk (SDRE, 197) converts TO Christianity. Bazan (Pedro the Lion, 198) departs FROM it. Opposite trajectories, same fundamental questions.
examples: Enigk: conversion, spiritual albums, Return of the Frog Queen.
Bazan: departure, questioning, loss of organized faith.
Both wrestle with meaning, morality, transcendence.
Emo's emotional vulnerability has a spiritual dimension.
theory_nodes.description: Faith and doubt in emo. Enigk and Bazan. Opposite trajectories.

genealogy.relationship: Pedro the Lion at 198. Faith-doubt as emo thread.

theory_nodes.concept: E=4 confessional emo -- the quiet end of the emo spectrum. SDRE at E=5 (surging). Pedro the Lion at E=4 (conversational). Intense through restraint.
examples: E=5 emo: SDRE, surging, dynamic extremes.
E=4 emo: Pedro the Lion, conversational, restraint.
Same genre family, different energy level.
theory_nodes.description: E=4 confessional emo. Quiet intensity. Storytelling.

genealogy.relationship: Pedro the Lion at 198. E=4 as quiet emo.

cross_references.relationship: E=5 to E=4. FIRST EMO to second emo. Enigk's faith, Bazan's doubt. The emo thread.
Both E=4. Both restrained. Indie rock restraint parallels confessional emo restraint.
Same late-90s/early-2000s indie scene. Parallel storytellers. Capitol Hill to Greenwood.
First Death Cab entry. The indie/emo ecosystem that produced both bands.
